pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + EMA + Partial RoPE + Rank-8 TTT Hooks (1.1591 bpb)

output.summary: 11-layer PR315-derived stack uses last-4-layer XSA, EMA, Partial RoPE, LN scaling, mixed int6/int8 export, and embedded long-document LoRA TTT hooks.
techniques: XSA applied only on final four layers with layerwise normalization scaling
Partial RoPE on a subset of heads plus EMA smoothing for stability
Mixed int6/int8 export through zstd combined with integrated long-document LoRA TTT hooks
